mapper.sql: id, user_id, trip_name, city_id, city_name, city_lat, city_lng, start_date, end_date, day_count, place_groups, pace, preference_text, candidates, status, idempotency_key, created_trip_id, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_subscriptions (user_id, tier, ai_trips_used) VALUES (#{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, 'FREE', 0) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE user_subscriptions SET ai_trips_used = ai_trips_used + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND ai_trips_used < CASE WHEN tier = 'PRO' THEN 10 ELSE 3 END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_trip_drafts ( id, user_id, trip_name, city_id, city_name, city_lat, city_lng, start_date, end_date, day_count, place_groups, pace, preference_text, candidates, status ) VALUES ( #{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{tripName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cityLat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cityLng,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{startDate,javaType=java.time.LocalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,javaType=java.time.LocalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{dayCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{placeGroups,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{pace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{preferenceText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{candidates,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_trip_drafts SET status = 'COMPLETED', idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_trip_id = #{tripId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{draftId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER} AND user_id = #{userId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}
